name: Financial Educators
description_short: Member-owned federal credit union serving Daytona Beach area since 1969, offering free checking, competitive loan rates, and financial counseling to members.
description_long:
Financial Educators Federal Credit Union was founded in July 1969 by Roy F. Bergengren (grandson of the U.S. credit union movement founder) and nine colleagues at Daytona Beach Junior College. It operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit institution serving the Daytona Beach community with a philosophy centered on treating members as owners rather than customers.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including free checking accounts, auto loans (as low as 5.99% APR), personal loans (10.90% APR), home equity loans, share-secured loans (3.15% APR), and the Falcon MasterCard (8.88% APR). Members also have access to check ordering services, cashier's checks ($5 fee), money orders ($1 fee), wire transfers (domestic $25, international $50, incoming $10), direct deposit, payroll deduction, and night deposit boxes at the Daytona Beach campus location.

The institution distinguishes itself through personalized member service, free financial counseling including debt counseling, loan counseling, and retirement planning. Members receive one-on-one guidance on loan selection and debt management. The credit union emphasizes accessibility with phone support at (386) 506-3040 and a dedicated debit card fraud line at 1-800-472-3272. Their mission explicitly states members "have a voice" and become permanent members once joined.

As a credit union, Financial Educators operates on NCUA insurance rather than FDIC insurance, which is standard for federally-chartered credit unions. The organization's reach appears limited to the Daytona Beach campus area, and specific membership eligibility criteria are not detailed on the website. Loan rates shown are competitive but subject to change and individual qualification.
pros: Free checking accounts with no monthly fees mentioned
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.99% APR
Free financial counseling including debt, loan, and retirement planning services
Personalized one-on-one loan counseling for members
Member-owned structure means customers are owners with voting rights
Multiple service options including direct deposit, payroll deduction, and night deposits
Established 55+ year history (since 1969) with community roots
cons: Limited physical location (appears to be only Daytona Beach campus, Building 300, Room 122)
Membership eligibility criteria not clearly defined on website
Loan approval times and processing speeds not disclosed
No mention of mobile banking, online account opening, or digital services
Personal loan APR of 10.90% is higher than many online personal lenders
best_for: Daytona Beach area residents seeking personalized financial counseling alongside banking
Members wanting free checking with competitive auto loan rates
Individuals needing one-on-one debt or retirement planning assistance
Borrowers with existing relationship at Daytona State College (formerly DBJC)
diagnosis: Financial Educators FCU is best for Daytona Beach-area residents seeking member-owned banking with free checking and personalized financial counseling. Primary caveat: limited to one physical location and no clear information about membership eligibility or modern digital banking services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Financial Educators — NCUA-insured credit union in Daytona Beach, FL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
